sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91175" key="pte/rws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτέρ-ως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91175.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the winged god</tr_>, a play on the name of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἔρως</foreign>, Poet. ap. eund.ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg012:252b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">252b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
